results.rendered_html:
māyādevī (mā˚ + de˚) f. N. pr.
1〉 der Mutter Śākyamuniʼs  BURN. Intr. 535 .  LALIT. ed. Calc. 28,20 . 45,18 . 63,13 . 68,16  (˚devīm). 17  (˚devyāḥ).  SCHIEFNER, Lebensb. 234 (4.) . māyāyā devyāḥ  H. 237 , Sch. māyādevīsuta m. Bez. Śākyamuniʼs  AK. 1,1,1,10 .
— 2〉 der Gattin Pradyumnaʼs (vorher Śambaraʼs)  VP. 575. fg. ; vgl. māyāvatī.
